text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
When I'm staffing the check-out desk at the
library, I get to see all sorts of people, borrowing
all sorts of books—it's so fun. ♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Like "Oh, I didn't know she was into books like
this," and "Oh, then I bet she'd like that book
too." My imagination starts going wild!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I mean... I-I keep it to my imagination! I'd
never dare tell anyone! Who checked out what is
confidential information!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Um, speaking of which... would you mind keeping
what I just told you a secret?
